mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_gi_subsystems_history ( analysis_time, run_sequence, runs, consensus_threshold, resolution, discovery_result, total_subsystems, avg_stability_score, started_at, completed_at, created_at, created_by_envelope, created_by_hash ) VALUES ( CAST(#{analysisTime} AS TIMESTAMP), COALESCE( (SELECT MAX(run_sequence) FROM tb_gi_subsystems_history WHERE analysis_time = CAST(#{analysisTime} AS TIMESTAMP)), 0 ) + 1, #{runs}, #{consensusThreshold}, #{resolution}, #{discoveryResult}, #{totalSubsystems}, #{avgStabilityScore}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{createdByEnvelope}, #{createdByHash} )
mapper.select: SELECT discovery_run_id, analysis_time, run_sequence, runs, consensus_threshold, resolution, discovery_result, total_subsystems, avg_stability_score, started_at, completed_at, created_at, created_by_envelope AS createdByEnvelope, created_by_hash AS createdByHash FROM tb_gi_subsystems_history WHERE analysis_time = CAST(#{analysisTime} AS TIMESTAMP) AND runs = #{runs} AND consensus_threshold = #{consensusThreshold} AND resolution = #{resolution} ORDER BY discovery_run_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT discovery_result FROM tb_gi_subsystems_history WHERE discovery_run_id = #{discoveryRunId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_gi_subsystems_llm_summary ( discovery_run_id, llm_model, summary_type, summary_text, created_at ) VALUES ( #{discoveryRunId}, #{llmModel}, #{summaryType}, #{summaryText}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
